name: Hearty Meat & Vidalia Onion Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a pie shell using the canned biscuits.
2. In a pan, sauté ground beef, onions, and mushrooms in oil until the meat is lightly browned and onions are limp. Drain excess fat and seasonings, then mix well. Remove from heat and add eggs. Mix thoroughly and pour over the biscuit layer.
3. In a separate bowl, combine Swiss cheese, Cheddar cheese, 3 large eggs, sour cream, and half and half. Spread this mixture over the meat layer.
4. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes or until browned.
